entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the target crop for resistance introgression

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A disease caused by F. oxysporum f. sp. ciceris that damages chickpea

entities.name: F. OXYSPORUM F. SP. CICERIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing fusarium wilt in chickpea

entities.name: FOC 2
entities.description: Pathogen race 2 of F. oxysporum f. sp. ciceris causing severe yield losses in central India

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where Foc 2 causes significant damage to chickpea

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method used to introgress specific traits using molecular markers

entities.name: VIJAY
entities.description: A desi chickpea cultivar used as the donor for resistance to Foc 2

entities.name: PUSA 256
entities.description: An elite desi chickpea cultivar used as the recurrent parent for introgression

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO FUSARIUM WILT RACE 2
entities.description: The trait being transferred from the donor to the recurrent parent

entities.name: FOREGROUND SELECTION
entities.description: A method using markers to confirm the presence of the target trait or gene

entities.name: BACKGROUND SELECTION
entities.description: A method using markers to monitor the recovery of the recurrent parent's genome

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used for both foreground and background selection

entities.name: TA 37
entities.description: A specific SSR marker used for foreground selection of resistance

entities.name: TA110
entities.description: A specific SSR marker used for foreground selection of resistance

entities.name: FOC 2 GENE
entities.description: The specific gene providing resistance to Fusarium wilt race 2
